ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course (e.g., PEP 112) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Full name of the course (e.g., Electricity and Magnetism) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "lecture_hours" INTEGER /* Number of lecture hours per week */,
  "lab_hours" INTEGER /* Number of lab hours per week */,
  "study_hours" INTEGER /* Number of study hours per week */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Total credit hours awarded for the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Biology, Chemistry) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department's focus and goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours for the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is taken (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is taken */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite record */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course requiring a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" TEXT /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite (e.g., co-requisite, pre-requisite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course schedule record */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course being scheduled */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "lecture_day" TEXT /* Day of the week for lecture (e.g., Monday) */,
  "lecture_time" TEXT /* Time of the lecture */,
  "lab_day" TEXT /* Day of the week for lab (e.g., Tuesday) */,
  "lab_time" TEXT /* Time of the lab */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number for the lecture or lab */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment record */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course being assessed */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, exam, project) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the assessment towards the final grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_score" TEXT /* Score given to the course by the student */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_instructors" (
  "student_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-instructor record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being advised */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor advising the student */,
  "advisor_type" TEXT /* Type of advisor (e.g., academic, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_instructors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)
